extra.reason: Created docs/llms-convention.md based on existing structure of packages/reformer-cdk/docs/llms/ and packages/reformer/llms.txt; aligned section names with @reformer/mcp parser (packages/reformer-mcp/src/utils/docs-parser.ts) and JSDoc style from packages/reformer/src/

Generator implemented at scripts/generate-llms-txt/ (pure JS + TypeScript Compiler API, no new deps). Verified on @reformer/cdk: 18 sections, 69 public symbols, idempotent on rerun. Smoke-tested on all 6 reformer packages without crashes. Generated llms.txt files reverted - actual generation is T2.6.

Wired generate:llms across all 6 @reformer/* packages pointing to scripts/generate-llms-txt. Removed 4 obsolete per-package generators (packages/<pkg>/scripts/generate-llms.ts) - they only concatenated MD files, new generator supersedes them with JSDoc parsing. Added root-level npm run generate:llms that fans out via --workspaces --if-present. Renamed task name from build:llms to generate:llms to match existing convention; updated docs/llms-convention.md and generator output.

@reformer/renderer-json brought to llms-convention: created docs/llms/{01-overview,02-json-schema,03-registry,04-troubleshooting}.md and added/extended JSDoc with @example on all 5 public API groups (JsonFormRenderer, type guards, defineRegistry, FIELD_WRAPPER, JsonRendererProvider/useJsonRendererSettings, ComponentRegistry types). Generator yields 4 doc files + 16 public symbols, idempotent.

@reformer/renderer-react: rewrote 01-overview.md, added 02-render-schema.md / 03-render-behavior.md / 04-troubleshooting.md. JSDoc on key public symbols (FormRenderer, createRenderSchema, hideWhen, onInit, ...) was already present. Generator produces 4 doc files + 29 public symbols, idempotent.

JSDoc audit complete. All 5 packages pass: 0 symbols missing description, 0 callable symbols missing @example. Convention updated to mark @example as required for callable (function/class/const-fn) and recommended for types/interfaces. Generator gained --audit flag for ongoing checks. Added JSDoc + @example to ~30 symbols across reformer-core (FormNode, NodeFactory, AbstractRegistry, uniqueId, extractKey/Path, useHiddenCondition), reformer-cdk (FormArrayContext/ItemContext, FormFieldContext, FormWizard/WizardContext/Actions, useFormArrayContext/ItemContext/FieldContext), reformer-renderer-react (RenderContextProvider, RenderNodeComponent, isRenderSchemaProxy), reformer-ui-kit (Button, Input, InputMask, InputPassword, Textarea, Checkbox, RadioGroup, Select+8 sub, FormField, AsyncBoundary, ExampleCard, cn). Also fixed generator bug: overloaded functions now pick the richest JSDoc, not the first one.

Generated llms.txt for all 6 packages via npm run generate:llms (root command). Counts: core 21 docs/88 syms, cdk 3/69, ui-kit 3/38, renderer-react 4/29, renderer-json 4/16, mcp 0/0. Verified idempotency: rerun produces no diff in any package.

AGENTS.md already existed (bd workflow guide). Prepended ReFormer documentation section: per-package docs/llms/ map, MCP server usage, golden examples in react-playground, generate:llms commands, rules (no manual llms.txt edits, JSDoc convention).

Extended docs-parser.ts to all @reformer/* packages. Added: KNOWN_PACKAGES list, getFullDocs(pkg), getAllDocs() concatenation, listAvailablePackages(), per-package cache (Map). All public APIs (getSection, searchDocs, getApiMethod, getExamples, getTroubleshooting) accept pkg parameter, '*' means all packages. Backward-compatible: omitting pkg still works (defaults to @reformer/core for getFullDocs, '*' for search). Build passes; smoke-test verified all 6 packages accessible.

Per-package MCP resources added. URI shape: reformer://<category>/<short> where category is docs|api|examples|troubleshooting and <short> is package name without @reformer/ prefix (e.g., 'cdk', 'ui-kit'). Without <short> returns aggregated content across all available packages. Resource list dynamically built from listAvailablePackages(). Build passes.

JSDoc/TSDoc parser for MCP added at packages/reformer-mcp/src/utils/symbols-parser.ts. Uses TypeScript Compiler API directly (typescript moved to dependencies, was devDep). Provides PublicSymbol type, getPublicSymbols(pkg), findSymbol(name, pkg='*'), listSymbols(pkg). Per-package cache. Mirrors logic of scripts/generate-llms-txt: re-export traversal, overload-aware (richest declaration wins), all standard tags supported. Smoke-test: cdk yields 69 symbols, findSymbol('useFormControl') returns full description with overloaded implementation.

MCP tool get_symbol_docs added at packages/reformer-mcp/src/tools/get-symbol-docs.ts. Accepts { symbol, package? } where package can be specific @reformer/* or '*' (default = all). Returns markdown with description, signature, params, type params, returns, examples, deprecated, see, source path. Tool registered in tools/index.ts and src/index.ts handler. Build passes; smoke-test on useFormControl returns full overload-aware JSDoc.

MCP tool find_example added at packages/reformer-mcp/src/tools/find-example.ts. Built-in scenarios: wizard, multi-step, array, form-array, renderer, renderer-react, json, renderer-json, json-schema, simple, basic, behavior(s), validation, async-validation. For unknown scenario falls back to symbol lookup (returns @example block) or lists known scenarios. Truncates large files to maxLines (default 200). Tool registered. Smoke-test: scenario='wizard' returns CreditApplicationForm.tsx.

Resource reformer://api/<pkg> now returns compact symbol list from JSDoc via listSymbols(pkg) instead of API Reference section from llms.txt. Aggregated reformer://api concatenates lists for all available packages. Display name updated to 'Public API Index'. Build passes; smoke-test on @reformer/cdk shows 69 symbols with kind + first-line description.

Added prompt 'review' that aggregates anti-patterns and troubleshooting from all @reformer/* packages and walks the model through a cross-package checklist (state setup, React integration, CDK/UI-kit/renderers, errors). Always available (not gated by REFORMER_DEBUG, unlike debug). Build passes.

All 15 child tasks completed. PROMT.md fully implemented: documentation convention (docs/llms-convention.md), llms.txt generator (scripts/generate-llms-txt/), generate:llms wired into all 6 packages, renderer-json brought to convention, renderer-react completed, JSDoc audit passed for all packages, llms.txt regenerated, AGENTS.md updated, MCP server extended with per-package resources, JSDoc-based symbol parser, get_symbol_docs and find_example tools, public API index resource, and review prompt.

Removed cdk doc copies (02-form-array.md, 03-form-navigation.md). Rewrote 01-overview.md with installation, peer-deps, import patterns, components table linking to 02-/03-/04-/05-/06-, quick start. Audit: 0/0.
Added 04-form-field.md describing FormField.Root/Label/Control/Error/Description compound API + useFormFieldContext with 4 examples, anti-patterns, troubleshooting
Added 05-recipes.md with 4 recipes (Nested FormArray, Custom AddButton, Conditional/dynamic step count, Externally-controlled wizard via FormWizardHandle)

Added 05-cookbook.md to renderer-react (custom fieldWrapper, programmatic node API, custom container, combining behaviors) and renderer-json ($template arrays, source functions, control props, TS->JSON migration). Audit 0/0 for both packages.

Created 02-text-fields.md (Input/InputMask/InputPassword/Textarea with API tables, common patterns, anti-patterns), 03-choice-fields.md (Checkbox/RadioGroup/Select + 8 sub-components, inline options, async resource, grouped options), 04-layout-and-buttons.md (Button variants matrix, asChild, AsyncBoundary, ExampleCard, cn). Audit 0/0.

Created 5 behavior recipe docs (23-copy-from, 24-sync-fields, 25-reset-when, 26-transform-value, 27-revalidate-when) with Purpose/API/2-4 examples/Anti-patterns/Troubleshooting/See also. Audit passes (0 missing).

Created 05-form-field-integration.md: standalone usage, fieldWrapper for FormRenderer with CreditApplicationFormRenderer reference, custom children via CdkFormField.Control asChild, Checkbox-special handling rationale (component === Checkbox detector). Audit 0/0.

Added 06-troubleshooting.md (12 errors with snippets) + expanded JSDoc with 2 @example each on FormArrayHandle, FormWizardHandle, useFormArray, useFormArrayContext, useFormArrayItemContext, useFormFieldContext, useFormWizard
Created 28-submit-and-reset.md and 29-async-preload.md with markAsTouched/validate/getValue/reset/pending lifecycle and patchValue+queueMicrotask preload pattern. Audit clean.

Extended JSDoc on 8 behavior files (watchField, enableWhen, disableWhen, computeFrom, copyFrom, syncFields, resetWhen, transformValue, createTransformer, transformers, revalidateWhen) — each public export now has 2 substantive @example blocks (try/catch+guard for async, resetOnDisable, idempotent transforms, etc.). Audit clean.

Created 06-troubleshooting.md (11 issues: number-input as string, empty Select options, mask passthrough, forwardRef+Slot conflicts, Checkbox value not saved, FormField errors, Select/RadioGroup onBlur, cn merging, AsyncBoundary stuck, password toggle missing, JSON-renderer source). JSDoc deep-dive on every Props interface (per-prop /** ... */) and 2 substantive @example for every component (Input, InputMask, InputPassword, Textarea, Checkbox, RadioGroup, Select + 8 sub, Button, AsyncBoundary, ExampleCard, FormField, Box, Section, Collapsible, cn). Audit 0/0 across 38 public symbols.

Generated llms.txt for all 6 packages (idempotent). Counts: core 28 docs/141 syms, cdk 6/69, ui-kit 6/38, renderer-react 5/29, renderer-json 5/16, mcp 0/0. MCP smoke-tests PASS: copyFrom found with 2 examples, find_example('wizard') returns CreditApplicationForm, ui-kit doc has all 5 new sections, watchField example contains guard/try-catch. Bonus fix: parsers (generator and symbols-parser) now flatten 'export * as ns from' namespace exports - core symbol count grew 88→141. Bug fix: 03-render-behavior.md examples corrected to standalone-helper API (was using non-existent proxy.node().apply syntax). Three internal context impl classes (BehaviorContextImpl, ValidationContextImpl, TreeValidationContextImpl) got JSDoc with @example.

EPIC-DOCS2 complete. All 12 child tasks closed. Documentation coverage: every @reformer/* package has overview, thematic recipes, anti-patterns, and troubleshooting. JSDoc audit: 0 missing descriptions, 0 callable without @example across 5 packages (293 total public symbols). MCP smoke-tests PASS.
